tv.generator-info-name: WebGrab+Plus/w MDB & REX Postprocess -- version V5.5.0.0 -- Jan van Straaten

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When back-to-back shootings at women's clinics leave two healthcare providers dead, Hondo and the team investigate whether the shootings were politically motivated.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth's day is turned upside down when she is reunited with a former colleague from Chicago.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: When a U.S. mercenary claiming to fight child trafficking abroad is apprehended after the U.S. DOJ suspects his crew of embezzlement, Tate and Raines attempt to get him to flip.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: When Dr. Laken Perillos resurfaces to join Wujing's crusade against Red, a member of The Task Force is put in danger.

programme.title: TWISTED METAL
programme.desc: Calypso drops a huge twist; Sweet Tooth goes wild; John and Quiet face their feelings.

programme.title: TWISTED METAL
programme.desc: John and Quiet endure a major test; Calypso investigates secrets that could change it all.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they're after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: When a finance executive is found stabbed to death after a night at the opera, Elsbeth suspects an obsessed opera lover (Nathan Lane) was driven to murder because of a ringing cell phone.

programme.title: THE AMAZING RACE
programme.desc: Teams continue racing in Slovenia, carefully traveling on foot-carrying wooden pieces on their back, descending deep into a cave and assembling a giant dragon and scraping off mussels in the waters.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: When Nick's estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Tan is left reeling when his girlfriend is kidnapped, and 20-Squad must race to track down a violent cartel leader who may be behind the abduction.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: When a finance executive is found stabbed to death after a night at the opera, Elsbeth suspects an obsessed opera lover (Nathan Lane) was driven to murder because of a ringing cell phone.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: When Dr. Laken Perillos resurfaces to join Wujing's crusade against Red, a member of The Task Force is put in danger.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: When Nick's estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Tan is left reeling when his girlfriend is kidnapped, and 20-Squad must race to track down a violent cartel leader who may be behind the abduction.

programme.title: THE AMAZING RACE
programme.desc: Teams continue racing in Slovenia, carefully traveling on foot-carrying wooden pieces on their back, descending deep into a cave and assembling a giant dragon and scraping off mussels in the waters.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth's day is turned upside down when she is reunited with a former colleague from Chicago.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: With an assist from NYPD's Maria Baez, Danny and Lena hunt down a serial home invader. Sean's budding romance faces unexpected complications.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: When a U.S. mercenary claiming to fight child trafficking abroad is apprehended after the U.S. DOJ suspects his crew of embezzlement, Tate and Raines attempt to get him to flip.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they're after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When back-to-back shootings at women's clinics leave two healthcare providers dead, Hondo and the team investigate whether the shootings were politically motivated.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: TWISTED METAL
programme.desc: Calypso drops a huge twist; Sweet Tooth goes wild; John and Quiet face their feelings.

programme.title: TWISTED METAL
programme.desc: John and Quiet endure a major test; Calypso investigates secrets that could change it all.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When two students are brutally attacked, 20-Squad contends with a possible honor killing. Meanwhile, Hondo and Nichelle have their first parenting dispute while searching for a suitable daycare.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth and the team retrace Mac's steps to find the truth.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: When a wild night in Amsterdam for three ex-Navy men ends with one found dead in his hotel room, the Fly Team must dive into the red-light district to hunt down his killer.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The return of The Freelancer unveils a conspiracy involving a local photographer. Ressler hits a personal milestone.

programme.title: RED EYE
programme.desc: As tensions rise on-board, Hana is instructed by the Head of MI5 to investigate.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail's relationship with her brother, Steve Peck, is put to the test in the search for the shooter.

programme.title: THE AMAZING RACE
programme.desc: Teams travel 1,000 miles from Slovenia to Sweden where they must face their fears and skydive from 10,000 feet over the Baltic sea, recreate a midsummer tradition and sort through recyclable items.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When back-to-back shootings at women's clinics leave two healthcare providers dead, Hondo and the team investigate whether the shootings were politically motivated.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The return of The Freelancer unveils a conspiracy involving a local photographer. Ressler hits a personal milestone.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth's day is turned upside down when she is reunited with a former colleague from Chicago.

programme.title: THE AMAZING RACE
programme.desc: Teams travel 1,000 miles from Slovenia to Sweden where they must face their fears and skydive from 10,000 feet over the Baltic sea, recreate a midsummer tradition and sort through recyclable items.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they're after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When back-to-back shootings at women's clinics leave two healthcare providers dead, Hondo and the team investigate whether the shootings were politically motivated.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth's day is turned upside down when she is reunited with a former colleague from Chicago.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The return of The Freelancer unveils a conspiracy involving a local photographer. Ressler hits a personal milestone.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they're after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When back-to-back shootings at women's clinics leave two healthcare providers dead, Hondo and the team investigate whether the shootings were politically motivated.

programme.title: THE AMAZING RACE
programme.desc: Teams travel 1,000 miles from Slovenia to Sweden where they must face their fears and skydive from 10,000 feet over the Baltic sea, recreate a midsummer tradition and sort through recyclable items.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth and the team retrace Mac's steps to find the truth.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: When a wild night in Amsterdam for three ex-Navy men ends with one found dead in his hotel room, the Fly Team must dive into the red-light district to hunt down his killer.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail's relationship with her brother, Steve Peck, is put to the test in the search for the shooter.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When two students are brutally attacked, 20-Squad contends with a possible honor killing. Meanwhile, Hondo and Nichelle have their first parenting dispute while searching for a suitable daycare.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: Gibbs and Franks investigate the disappearance of a young Marine connected to a mysterious compound with a charismatic leader, and Lala's fate is revealed.

programme.title: RED EYE
programme.desc: As tensions rise on-board, Hana is instructed by the Head of MI5 to investigate.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: Gibbs and Franks investigate the disappearance of a young Marine connected to a mysterious compound with a charismatic leader, and Lala's fate is revealed.

programme.title: DOC
programme.desc: A popular weight loss medication reveals the cracks in a couple's relationship and two sisters face an unexpected diagnosis.

programme.title: TOTAL RECALL
programme.desc: As the nation states Euromerica and New Shanghai vie for supremacy, factory worker Doug Quaid begins to suspect that he's a spy, though he is unaware which side of the fight he's on.

programme.title: SIGHT UNSEEN
programme.desc: When Lucas (Alec Santos) comes to Tess' (Dolly Lewis) apartment in the middle of the night claiming he just needs a place to crash, Tess is quick to realize something is up.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: While investigating the death of an employee at New York's most exclusive jewelry store, Elsbeth and the team uncover plans for a gala heist orchestrated by a chic VIP customer.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth investigates the death of a devious kitchen staffer after he causes havoc in New York's hottest restaurant and enrages one of America's most revered chefs.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: When a wild night in Amsterdam for three ex-Navy men ends with one found dead in his hotel room, the Fly Team must dive into the red-light district to hunt down his killer.

programme.title: CORONER
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a mass shooting, Jenny's investigation is derailed when her exhaustion leads to dangerous consequences.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When two students are brutally attacked, 20-Squad contends with a possible honor killing. Meanwhile, Hondo and Nichelle have their first parenting dispute while searching for a suitable daycare.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The Task Force investigates a series of social media conspiracies that simulate dangerous public attacks.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth and the team retrace Mac's steps to find the truth.

programme.title: CORONER
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a mass shooting, Jenny's investigation is derailed when her exhaustion leads to dangerous consequences.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail's relationship with her brother, Steve Peck, is put to the test in the search for the shooter.

programme.desc: When two students are brutally attacked, 20-Squad contends with a possible honor killing. Meanwhile, Hondo and Nichelle have their first parenting dispute while searching for a suitable daycare.

programme.desc: Elsbeth and the team retrace Mac's steps to find the truth.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The Task Force investigates a series of social media conspiracies that simulate dangerous public attacks.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail's relationship with her brother, Steve Peck, is put to the test in the search for the shooter.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When two students are brutally attacked, 20-Squad contends with a possible honor killing. Meanwhile, Hondo and Nichelle have their first parenting dispute while searching for a suitable daycare.

programme.title: CORONER
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a mass shooting, Jenny's investigation is derailed when her exhaustion leads to dangerous consequences.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: While investigating the death of an employee at New York's most exclusive jewelry store, Elsbeth and the team uncover plans for a gala heist orchestrated by a chic VIP customer.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: Gibbs and Franks investigate the disappearance of a young Marine connected to a mysterious compound with a charismatic leader, and Lala's fate is revealed.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: When a former Irish Republican Army is shot with his son touring youth football academies, Smitty and the Fly Team work to hunt down the people responsible as the group becomes increasingly violent.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA's corruption investigation into 15 Division.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo and the SWAT team race to stop a nuclear attack on Los Angeles when radioactive material is stolen from a local lab.

programme.title: DOC
programme.desc: A popular weight loss medication reveals the cracks in a couple's relationship and two sisters face an unexpected diagnosis.

programme.title: LONG BRIGHT RIVER
programme.desc: Mickey and Truman grow closer as they follow their new lead. A new victim complicates the case of the murdered women and raises the stakes in the hunt to find Kacey.

programme.desc: A popular weight loss medication reveals the cracks in a couple's relationship and two sisters face an unexpected diagnosis.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo and the SWAT team race to stop a nuclear attack on Los Angeles when radioactive material is stolen from a local lab.

programme.desc: While investigating the death of an employee at New York's most exclusive jewelry store, Elsbeth and the team uncover plans for a gala heist orchestrated by a chic VIP customer.

programme.desc: The Task Force investigates a series of social media conspiracies that simulate dangerous public attacks.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA's corruption investigation into 15 Division.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: When a former Irish Republican Army is shot with his son touring youth football academies, Smitty and the Fly Team work to hunt down the people responsible as the group becomes increasingly violent.

programme.title: LONG BRIGHT RIVER
programme.desc: Mickey and Truman grow closer as they follow their new lead. A new victim complicates the case of the murdered women and raises the stakes in the hunt to find Kacey.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo and the SWAT team race to stop a nuclear attack on Los Angeles when radioactive material is stolen from a local lab.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The Task Force races against the clock to recover a valuable asset stolen from the US government. Red hatches a plan to help track down the perpetrators.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: While investigating the death of an employee at New York's most exclusive jewelry store, Elsbeth and the team uncover plans for a gala heist orchestrated by a chic VIP customer.

programme.title: LONG BRIGHT RIVER
programme.desc: Mickey and Truman grow closer as they follow their new lead. A new victim complicates the case of the murdered women and raises the stakes in the hunt to find Kacey.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA's corruption investigation into 15 Division.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo and the SWAT team race to stop a nuclear attack on Los Angeles when radioactive material is stolen from a local lab.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: While investigating the death of an employee at New York's most exclusive jewelry store, Elsbeth and the team uncover plans for a gala heist orchestrated by a chic VIP customer.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA's corruption investigation into 15 Division.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo and the SWAT team race to stop a nuclear attack on Los Angeles when radioactive material is stolen from a local lab.

programme.title: LONG BRIGHT RIVER
programme.desc: Mickey and Truman grow closer as they follow their new lead. A new victim complicates the case of the murdered women and raises the stakes in the hunt to find Kacey.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth investigates the death of a devious kitchen staffer after he causes havoc in New York's hottest restaurant and enrages one of America's most revered chefs.

programme.title: DOC
programme.desc: A popular weight loss medication reveals the cracks in a couple's relationship and two sisters face an unexpected diagnosis.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: When the owner of a prominent cyber security company is murdered in Copenhagen, mass amounts of data are leaked, sending the NSA to the Fly Team for assistance, including the Bureau's liaison to the NSA.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15's evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky -career-ending -plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad must race to uncover a dangerous enemy intent on revenge. Also, Deacon and Tan butt heads over Tan's changes to SWAT academy.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an FDIC security guard is killed while tending to a pregnant woman in distress, the team works to locate the woman and the killer who took her hostage.

programme.title: TOTAL RECALL
programme.desc: As the nation states Euromerica and New Shanghai vie for supremacy, factory worker Doug Quaid begins to suspect that he's a spy, though he is unaware which side of the fight he's on.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad must race to uncover a dangerous enemy intent on revenge. Also, Deacon and Tan butt heads over Tan's changes to SWAT academy.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth investigates the death of a devious kitchen staffer after he causes havoc in New York's hottest restaurant and enrages one of America's most revered chefs.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: When the owner of a prominent cyber security company is murdered in Copenhagen, mass amounts of data are leaked, sending the NSA to the Fly Team for assistance, including the Bureau's liaison to the NSA.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The Task Force races against the clock to recover a valuable asset stolen from the US government. Red hatches a plan to help track down the perpetrators.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an FDIC security guard is killed while tending to a pregnant woman in distress, the team works to locate the woman and the killer who took her hostage.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15's evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky -career-ending -plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: CORONER
programme.desc: Jenny (Serinda Swan) and Ross (Ehren Kassam) host Thanksgiving at home. But when an unidentified body turns up on Jenny's propery, her work life and personal life collide in the worst possible way.

programme.title: CORONER
programme.desc: After opening several inquests, Jenny (Serinda Swan) is stumped by one particularly troubling case which she quickly realizes is very personal for Detective McAvoy (Roger Cross).

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: When Nick's estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they're after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: JURASSIC WORLD: FALLEN KINGDOM
programme.desc: Owen and Claire return to the ruins of the Jurassic World theme park to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from a looming volcanic extinction.

programme.title: CYRIL: SIMPLY MAGIC
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: With an assist from NYPD's Maria Baez, Danny and Lena hunt down a serial home invader. Sean's budding romance faces unexpected complications.

programme.title: SIGHT UNSEEN
programme.desc: When Lucas (Alec Santos) comes to Tess' (Dolly Lewis) apartment in the middle of the night claiming he just needs a place to crash, Tess is quick to realize something is up.

programme.title: LONG BRIGHT RIVER
programme.desc: Mickey and Truman grow closer as they follow their new lead. A new victim complicates the case of the murdered women and raises the stakes in the hunt to find Kacey.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: DOC
programme.desc: A popular weight loss medication reveals the cracks in a couple's relationship and two sisters face an unexpected diagnosis.

programme.title: TOTAL RECALL
programme.desc: As the nation states Euromerica and New Shanghai vie for supremacy, factory worker Doug Quaid begins to suspect that he's a spy, though he is unaware which side of the fight he's on.

programme.title: SIGHT UNSEEN
programme.desc: When Lucas (Alec Santos) comes to Tess' (Dolly Lewis) apartment in the middle of the night claiming he just needs a place to crash, Tess is quick to realize something is up.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an FDIC security guard is killed while tending to a pregnant woman in distress, the team works to locate the woman and the killer who took her hostage.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Lena's pursuit of justice forces Danny into an unexpected role reversal, while Sarah faces a personal dilemma that tests her resolve.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: Gibbs and Franks investigate the disappearance of a young Marine connected to a mysterious compound with a charismatic leader, and Lala's fate is revealed.

programme.title: M3GAN
programme.desc: M3GAN, a prototype doll and marvel of A.I., is paired with a young girl, leading to unimaginable consequences. From the producers of The Black Phone and Annabelle.

programme.title: JURASSIC WORLD: FALLEN KINGDOM
programme.desc: Owen and Claire return to the ruins of the Jurassic World theme park to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from a looming volcanic extinction.

programme.title: CYRIL: SIMPLY MAGIC
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.desc: When a finance executive is found stabbed to death after a night at the opera, Elsbeth suspects an obsessed opera lover (Nathan Lane) was driven to murder because of a ringing cell phone.

programme.desc: Elsbeth's day is turned upside down when she is reunited with a former colleague from Chicago.

programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail's relationship with her brother, Steve Peck, is put to the test in the search for the shooter.

programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA's corruption investigation into 15 Division.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Lena's pursuit of justice forces Danny into an unexpected role reversal, while Sarah faces a personal dilemma that tests her resolve.

programme.desc: In the aftermath of a mass shooting, Jenny's investigation is derailed when her exhaustion leads to dangerous consequences.

programme.desc: When Lucas (Alec Santos) comes to Tess' (Dolly Lewis) apartment in the middle of the night claiming he just needs a place to crash, Tess is quick to realize something is up.

programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: M3GAN
programme.desc: M3GAN, a prototype doll and marvel of A.I., is paired with a young girl, leading to unimaginable consequences. From the producers of The Black Phone and Annabelle.

programme.title: CORONER
programme.desc: Jenny (Serinda Swan) and Ross (Ehren Kassam) host Thanksgiving at home. But when an unidentified body turns up on Jenny's propery, her work life and personal life collide in the worst possible way.

programme.desc: After opening several inquests, Jenny (Serinda Swan) is stumped by one particularly troubling case which she quickly realizes is very personal for Detective McAvoy (Roger Cross).

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Lena's pursuit of justice forces Danny into an unexpected role reversal, while Sarah faces a personal dilemma that tests her resolve.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: Gibbs and Franks investigate the disappearance of a young Marine connected to a mysterious compound with a charismatic leader, and Lala's fate is revealed.

programme.desc: When Lucas (Alec Santos) comes to Tess' (Dolly Lewis) apartment in the middle of the night claiming he just needs a place to crash, Tess is quick to realize something is up.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: DOC
programme.desc: A popular weight loss medication reveals the cracks in a couple's relationship and two sisters face an unexpected diagnosis.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Lena's pursuit of justice forces Danny into an unexpected role reversal, while Sarah faces a personal dilemma that tests her resolve.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: Gibbs and Franks investigate the disappearance of a young Marine connected to a mysterious compound with a charismatic leader, and Lala's fate is revealed.

programme.title: XXX
programme.desc: A former extreme sports athlete is recruited by the government for a special undercover mission.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Lena's pursuit of justice forces Danny into an unexpected role reversal, while Sarah faces a personal dilemma that tests her resolve.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad contends with a hostage crisis. Also, Hondo receives a family visit.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Celebrity Christmas curators Dirk and DeeDee Dashers go from tinsel to tragedy after Dirk is killed.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The Fly Team heads to Oslo when they are tipped off that two Norwegian prisoners are being held in Russia.

programme.title: CYRIL: SIMPLY MAGIC
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: TWISTED METAL
programme.desc: John and Quiet prepare for a showdown, but many hurdles stand in their way.

programme.title: TWISTED METAL
programme.desc: All roads, with their unexpected twists and turns, lead to this. And Calypso grants a wish.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to move on from the corruption scandal, a heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth investigates the death of a devious kitchen staffer after he causes havoc in New York's hottest restaurant and enrages one of America's most revered chefs.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: When the owner of a prominent cyber security company is murdered in Copenhagen, mass amounts of data are leaked, sending the NSA to the Fly Team for assistance, including the Bureau's liaison to the NSA.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an FDIC security guard is killed while tending to a pregnant woman in distress, the team works to locate the woman and the killer who took her hostage.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad must race to uncover a dangerous enemy intent on revenge. Also, Deacon and Tan butt heads over Tan's changes to SWAT academy.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: After an inmate opens fire at a high-security prison, the Task Force investigates a contraband smuggler known as The Postman. Cooper revisits his past ties to the suspect.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth investigates the death of a devious kitchen staffer after he causes havoc in New York's hottest restaurant and enrages one of America's most revered chefs.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an FDIC security guard is killed while tending to a pregnant woman in distress, the team works to locate the woman and the killer who took her hostage.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15's evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky -career-ending -plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad must race to uncover a dangerous enemy intent on revenge. Also, Deacon and Tan butt heads over Tan's changes to SWAT academy.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth investigates the death of a devious kitchen staffer after he causes havoc in New York's hottest restaurant and enrages one of America's most revered chefs.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: After an inmate opens fire at a high-security prison, the Task Force investigates a contraband smuggler known as The Postman. Cooper revisits his past ties to the suspect.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15's evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky -career-ending -plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad must race to uncover a dangerous enemy intent on revenge. Also, Deacon and Tan butt heads over Tan's changes to SWAT academy.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an FDIC security guard is killed while tending to a pregnant woman in distress, the team works to locate the woman and the killer who took her hostage.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Celebrity Christmas curators Dirk and DeeDee Dashers go from tinsel to tragedy after Dirk is killed.

programme.title: SIGHT UNSEEN
programme.desc: With Tess now back on duty with the Metro PD as a police consultant and Sunny as her under the radar tech partner, a murder hits close to home for Tess and Sunny's first 'on the books' case.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The Fly Team heads to Oslo when they are tipped off that two Norwegian prisoners are being held in Russia.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to move on from the corruption scandal, a heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad contends with a hostage crisis. Also, Hondo receives a family visit.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Lena's pursuit of justice forces Danny into an unexpected role reversal, while Sarah faces a personal dilemma that tests her resolve.

programme.title: TWISTED METAL
programme.desc: John and Quiet prepare for a showdown, but many hurdles stand in their way.

programme.title: TWISTED METAL
programme.desc: All roads, with their unexpected twists and turns, lead to this. And Calypso grants a wish.
